urls.title: BuildProven — Turn Expertise Into AI-Built Products | BuildProven
urls.description: Weekly AI strategies, tools, and frameworks for directors, senior managers, and experienced professionals. Learn how to stay indispensable, lead with confidence, and turn AI into a competitive advantage — without the hype.

text:
I am 52. 9 AI agents. 18 cron jobs.

Step 1: 165 commits across 13 repos last week
Step 2: SQLite migration corrupted 14 posts
Step 3: 3 hours at 10pm recovering from git

Build thread silently broken 2 weeks. Embarrassing.

https://t.co/EUYutfYzPe
